item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 8min Could Rory three-peat at Augusta?
It's 70 years since anyone won a men's major thre
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 8min Could Rory three-peat at Augusta?
It's 70 years since anyone won a men's major three straight years. Something neither Jack or Tiger ever did.
(Peter Thomson won The Open in 1954, 55 and 56) 1 4 565
